label: Ritual outcome comp (pawn skill)
description: Scores quality based on a skill level of the pawn in the specified role, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve evaluated at the skill level.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the pawn skill level (X) to quality offset (Y).

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: Ritual role ID string identifying which pawn's skill to evaluate.

skillDef.label: Skill def
skillDef.description: SkillDef whose level is evaluated for the role pawn.
